title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at UltraTech Cement

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at UltraTech Cement
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
